title: Korak 12

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should log the message "The Math.round() method rounds the value to the nearest whole integer." to the console.

description:
Sledeći deo radionice će pregledati kako zaokružiti brojeve na najbliži ceo broj.

Počnite dodavanjem console.log() koji loguje poruku "The Math.round() method rounds the value to the nearest whole integer." u konzolu.
